title: Crossfilter: Brush a Range to Filter (chart.link)

files.name: chart.js
index.html
files.code:
Drag a range on the histogram to filter the quarter chart
The top chart is a histogram of daily fluctuation %, binned by the link engine (bins: { count }) on a numeric x-axis. It has chart.selection.enabled, so brushing a range sets a [min, max] filter on the fluctuation dimension: the bottom chart re-aggregates to just the days in that range, and the histogram dims the bins outside it. Because a chart never filters itself, the histogram's own bars keep their full shape. Reset clears the brush.

files.name: styles.css
